tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: _________ having received several warnings, the factory continued to dump waste into the river.
"Can I borrow the car tonight?" -- "Yes, _________ you fill up the tank before you bring it back."
The northern region relies heavily on tourism, _________ the south depends almost entirely on agriculture.
We will proceed with the outdoor ceremony _________ it starts raining, in which case we will move indoors.
"Why are you taking a first-aid kit on the hike?" -- "Just _________ someone gets injured along the way."
_________ the fact that the evidence was overwhelming, the jury took three days to reach a verdict.
